title: ceratocephalus ciliatus
intro: Ceratocephalus ciliatus, also known as the hairy-headed ceratocephalus, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in digestion and relieve respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy for coughs and colds. The health benefits of Ceratocephalus ciliatus include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce swelling and alleviate pain, as well as its expectorant properties, which can help to clear mucus from the lungs. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, including bronchitis, asthma, and sore throats.
